dir.description: Absolute path to the project (workdir) directory. Required for all commands except 'list'.

name.description: Repository name for gitdir (init), or branch name (branch).

filepath.description: File path relative to project dir, for add/status/checkout/diff/restore.

message.description: Commit message (commit), stash message (stash push), or tag message (tag create annotated).

depth.description: Max number of log entries (log), or clone depth (clone).

ref.description: Git ref (branch, commit, tag) for checkout/revert/push/pull/clone.

checkout.description: Whether to checkout after creating branch (default: true).

refIdx.description: Stash entry index for apply/drop/pop operations (default: 0).

url.description: Remote repository URL for remote add, clone, or push.

oid.description: Target commit OID for tag creation (default: HEAD).

lightweight.description: Create lightweight tag instead of annotated (default: false).

noCheckout.description: Skip working tree checkout during clone (default: false).

auth.description: Optional inline credentials for push/pull/clone. When provided, bypasses Keychain lookup and the auth prompt page. Useful for CI / automated scripts.
